query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "self-improving language models with bidirectional evolutionary search" linguistics
rationale: The paper focuses on general continuous global optimization using hybrid evolutionary algorithms and sequential quadratic programming, which is an off-domain application of evolutionary computation compared to the user's specific question about "Self-Improving Language Models" and "Bidirectional Evolutionary Search" in a linguistics context.
